document_intelligence._note: Azure Document Intelligence prebuilt-layout extraction. Endpoint/key are read at runtime from env vars AZURE_DOC_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT / AZURE_DOC_INTELLIGENCE_KEY (add them to the Fabric environment .env resource). When caption_figures is true, cropped figure images are downloaded from DI, saved under Files/<figures_subdir>, and (if a multimodal vision_model and the openai endpoint are available) used to enrich figure captions. min_figure_page_fraction drops decorative figures (logos, header/footer glyphs) whose bounding box is below that share of the page, before captioning/saving/chunking; 0 keeps every figure.

eval._note: Standalone gold quality gate (contract_intelligence.eval.gold_eval). Scores contract_fields against a hand-authored ground truth derived from docs/Contract_Review.docx. Run on demand after prompt/field/model changes — not part of the daily pipeline. truth is keyed by join_key; results append to results_table in the gold lakehouse.

azure_openai._note: Auth is API-key via the openai.OpenAI client against AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT (.../openai/v1) with AZURE_AI_PROJECT_API_KEY. Model deployment names come from MAIN_MODEL/EMBEDDING_MODEL env vars; kept here for reference.

ai_search._note: Endpoint/key read at runtime from env (AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT / AZURE_SEARCH_API_KEY). Single index of clause evidence (one doc per silver chunk) consumed by the Foundry RAG agent. The index name is overridable by env AZURE_SEARCH_INDEX_NAME. The vectorizer uses the embedding deployment (EMBEDDING_MODEL) against AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT for query-time integrated vectorization. Requires azure-search-documents>=11.5.1.

reprocess._note: Force re-run of specific contracts (by relative_path) across silver/chunk/gold even when content_hash and code_hash are unchanged — e.g. recovering from a bug or a transient failure. Set force_paths to a list like ["folder/contract.pdf"] or the string "ALL". A notebook FORCE_PATHS parameter overrides this. Leave null for normal incremental runs.
